steps.title: Use the distance formula
steps.content: For constant speed, distance equals speed times time.

steps.title: Solve for time
steps.content:
Rearrange the formula to isolate time:
$$\text{time} = \frac{\text{distance}}{\text{speed}}$$
Then substitute the given values:
$$\text{time} = \frac{104 \text{ cm}}{13 \text{ cm/s}} = 8 \text{ s}$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The travel time is $8$ seconds, which confirms A. So A is correct.
